findings.annotation_source: Supplementary Table 3 provides DEGs used to annotate Early endothelial cells in prenatal skin. Listed as fine-grained annotation under broad 'Vascular endothelium' category.
findings.trajectory: Early endothelial cells serve as the root/progenitor population from which both arteriolar (capillaries, capillary arterioles, arterioles) and venular (postcapillary venules, venules) lineages differentiate (Fig. 4d, Extended Data Fig. 10a-c).
findings.macrophage_interactions: Macrophage subsets interact with early endothelial cells. Aggregated macrophage-endothelial ligand-receptor interactions included early endothelial cells, arterioles, capillary arterioles, capillaries, postcapillary venules and venules (Extended Data Fig. 9a, Supplementary Table 28).
findings.organoid_comparison: The SkO model had markedly reduced endothelial cell heterogeneity and quantity compared to prenatal skin. Immune cells are required to fully recapitulate in vivo endothelial cell development.
findings.temporal_presence: Endothelial cells are present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d, Supplementary Table 4).
findings.microenvironment: Endothelial cells co-locate with macrophages in neurovascular microenvironments ME1 and ME5 (Fig. 1d, Extended Data Fig. 1e).
